revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:足立神社 (さいたま市西区)]] {{Expand Japanese|足立神社 (さいたま市西区)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Adachi Shrine | native_name = 足立神社 | image = Adachi jinja, Nishi-ku, Saitama 2.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Adachi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.899358|139.592764}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Kamiyonanayo|lt=Kamiyonanayo|en|Kamiyonanayo|es|Kamiyonanayo|fr|Kamiyonanayo|hy|Կամիյոնանայո|ja|神世七代|ko|가미노요나나오|mni|ꯀꯃꯤꯌꯣꯅꯅꯌꯣ|pl|Kamiyonanayo|ru|Камиёнанаё|vi|Kamiyo-nanayo|zh|神世七代|qid=Q3275893|1=Kamiyonanayo}} }} {{nihongo|'''Adachi Shrine'''|足立神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Musashi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * P155: {{ill|Q135039731|ltq=Q135039731|qid=Q135039731|1=Awowino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)|lt=Hikawa Shrine|az|Hikava məbədi (Saytama)|de|Hikawa-Schrein|en|Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)|es|Santuario Hikawa|eu|Hikawa Jinja|fr|Hikawa-jinja|hu|Hikava szentély (Szaitama)|it|Santuario di Hikawa|ja|氷川神社|ko|히카와 신사|la|Templum Hikawa|sh|Hikawa hram (Saitama)|tr|Hikawa Tapınağı|zh|冰川神社|qid=Q703633|1=Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1075040|ltq=Q1075040|qid=Q1075040|1=Nishi-ku, Saitama}} * {{ill|Musashi Province|lt=Musashi Province|ar|محافظة موساشي|ca|Província de Musashi|ckb|پارێزگای موساشی|cs|Provincie Musaši|de|Provinz Musashi|en|Musashi Province|eo|Provinco Musaŝi|es|Provincia de Musashi|fa|ولایت موساشی|fr|Province de Musashi|gl|Provincia de Musashi|hak|Musashi-koet|id|Provinsi Musashi|it|Musashi (provincia)|ja|武蔵国|ko|무사시국|lt|Musašio žemė|nl|Musashi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Musashi|pt|Província de Musashi|ru|Мусаси (провинция)|simple|Musashi Province|sk|Musaši (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мусаши|th|แคว้นมูซาชิ|tr|Musashi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Мусаші|vi|Musashi (tỉnh)|zh_min_nan|Musasi-kok|zh_yue|武藏國|zh|武藏國|qid=Q907398|1=Musashi Province}} * {{ill|Q11637033|ltq=Q11637033|qid=Q11637033|1=Adachi district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * Thian-hông|zh_yue|應神天皇|zh|应神天皇|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E8%B6%B3%E7%AB%8B%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E3%81%95%E3%81%84%E3%81%9F%E3%81%BE%E5%B8%82%E8%A5%BF%E5%8C%BA) * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|ar|سوغاوارا نو ميتشيزانه|br|Sugawara no Michizane|ckb|سوگاوارا نۆ میچیزانێ|de|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|ensource|Author:Sugawara no Michizane|es|Sugawara no Michizane|fa|سوگاوارا نو میچی‌زانه|fi|Sugawara no Michizane|fr|Sugawara no Michizane|id|Sugawara no Michizane|it|Sugawara no Michizane|itquote|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|菅原道真|jaquote|菅原道真|jasource|作者:菅原道真|kk|Сугавара но Митидзане|ko|스가와라노 미치자네|la|Sugawara no Michizane|ms|Sugawara no Michizane|nl|Sugawara no Michizane|nn|Sugawara no Michizane|pl|Michizane Sugawara|pt|Sugawara no Michizane|ru|Сугавара-но Митидзанэ|rusource|Автор:Сугавара-но Митидзанэ|sh|Sugawara no Michizane|sv|Sugawara no Michizane|th|สึกาวาระ โนะ มิจิซาเนะ|tr|Sugawara no Michizane|uk|Суґавара но Мітідзане|zh_classical|菅原道真|zh_min_nan|Sugawara no Mitizane|zh|菅原道真|zhsource|Author:菅原道眞|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E8%B6%B3%E7%AB%8B%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE_(%E3%81%95%E3%81%84%E3%81%9F%E3%81%BE%E5%B8%82%E8%A5%BF%E5%8C%BA) == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181700 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == postal code (P281) == * 331-0058https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/download/zenken/index.html == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 5030005000203 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Atachino Shrine|lt=Atachino Shrine|qid=Q135039732|1=Atachino Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '埼玉県さいたま市西区飯田54', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:足立神社 (さいたま市西区)]] {{wikidata link|Q115739544}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Adachi Shrine |Image = [[File:Adachi jinja, Nishi-ku, Saitama 2.jpg|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Saitama Prefecture|Q128186|qid=Q128186|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Saitama City|Q134635|qid=Q134635|1=Saitama (city)}}{{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Saitama City)|Q1075040|qid=Q1075040|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Saitama}}{{ill|lt=Iida (Saitama City)|Q65293008|qid=Q65293008|lt=Iida|1=Iida}}54 |Coordinates = {{Coord|35|53|51.0|N|139|35|22.7|E|region:JP-11_scale:10000_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|lt=Kamiyo Nanayo|Q3275893|qid=Q3275893|lt=Seven Divine Generations|1=Kamiyonanayo}}; {{ill|lt=Chishin Godai|Q18337308|qid=Q18337308|lt=Five Earthly Deity Generations|1=Five Generations of Earth Deities}}; {{ill|lt=Yamato Takeru|Q461258|qid=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}}; {{ill|lt=Ichikishimahime|Q11059454|qid=Q11059454|lt=Ichikishimahime no Mikoto|1=Ichikishima-hime}}; {{ill|lt=Tagitsuhime|Q10932592|qid=Q10932592|lt=Tagitsuhime no Mikoto|1=Tagitsuhime}}; {{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko no Mikoto|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}}; {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi|Q276944|qid=Q276944|lt=Ōkuninushi no Kami|1=Ōkuninushi}}; {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Tajikarao|Q849412|qid=Q849412|lt=Ame-no-Tajikarao no Kami|1=Ame-no-Tajikarao}}; {{ill|lt=Kikurihime|Q11619891|qid=Q11619891|lt=Kikurihime no Mikoto|1=Kikurihime}}; {{ill|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama|Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|qid=Q3080728|lt=Ukanomitama no Mikoto|1=Ukanomitama}}; {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}}; {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}{{ill|lt=Ronsha|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}; Village shrine |Founded = During the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōrei|Q313041|qid=Q313041|1=Emperor Kōrei}} (BC 290–BC 215) |Main hall = |Alternate names = |Pilgrimage designation = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Saitama|label=Adachi Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=11|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Adachi Shrine''' (あだちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Nishi Ward (Saitama City)|Q1075040|qid=Q1075040|lt=Nishi Ward|1=Nishi-ku, Saitama}}, {{ill|lt=Saitama City|Q134635|qid=Q134635|1=Saitama (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Saitama Prefecture|Q128186|qid=Q128186|1=Saitama Prefecture}}. === History === It is said to have been founded during the reign of the 7th emperor, {{ill|lt=Emperor Kōrei|Q313041|qid=Q313041|1=Emperor Kōrei}}, and to have originally enshrined {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. Later, it is伝ed that when {{ill|lt=Yamato Takeru|Q461258|qid=Q461258|lt=Yamato Takeru no Mikoto|1=Yamato Takeru}} stopped by during his eastern expedition, he enshrined {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Susanoo no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}{{Cite web |title=History of Saitama Prefecture, Vol. 2: Nara and Heian Periods |url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/1049481/1/323?keyword=%E8%B6%B3%E7%AB%8B%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE |website=dl.ndl.go.jp |access-date=2025-05-14 |publisher=National Diet Library |author=Saitama Prefecture |language=ja |year=1931 |editor=Saitama Prefecture}}. This Shikinaisha, “Adachi Shrine,” was originally located in Ueta-go. However, as many years passed, by the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, multiple shrines called “Adachi Shrine” came to exist, and it became unclear which was the true Adachi Shrine. Even in the surrounding area alone, Adachi Shrines existed in both the main village of Ueta Village and in Mizuhando VillageSaitama Prefecture Shrine Association Shrine Survey Group (ed.), *Shrines of Saitama: Kita-Adachi, Kodama, and Minami-Saitama*, Saitama Prefecture Shrine Association, 1998, pp. 200–201.. In {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6), the “Hikawa Shrine” that stood at the present location of the former Iida Village was designated a “village shrine” under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. Through the {{ill|lt=shrine consolidation|Q11590700|qid=Q11590700|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}} of {{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}} (Meiji 40), 30 shrines within the then {{ill|lt=Uemizu Village|Q11540641|qid=Q11540641|1=Uemizu}} were merged into Hikawa Shrine. These included the two Adachi Shrines of the former Ueta Village main settlement and the former Mizuhando Village, and on this occasion the shrine was renamed from “Hikawa Shrine” to “Adachi Shrine”. === Access === *1-minute walk from the Adachi Shrine bus stop on a {{ill|lt=route bus|Q1373492|qid=Q1373492|1=Transit bus}}. === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} === References === *Saitama Prefecture Shrine Association Shrine Survey Group (ed.), *Shrines of Saitama: Kita-Adachi, Kodama, and Minami-Saitama*, Saitama Prefecture Shrine Association, 1998 {{Pref-stub|pref=Saitama Prefecture}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Adachi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Adachi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Musashi Province]] [[Category:History of Saitama Nishi ward]] [[Category:Buildings in Saitama Nishi ward]] [[Category:Son-sha in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Hikawa-jinja in Saitama, Saitama]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Musashi Province]] [[Category:Yamato Takeru]] [[Category:Sugawara no Michizane]] [[Category:Sugawara no Michizane]] [[Category:incorrect template category applied]]
